//: Scoop manifest (template) — Itasha.Corp C0PL4ND. Lives in the Itasha.Corp Scoop bucket (add via `scoop bucket add itasha-corp https://github.com/itasha-corp/scoop-bucket`, then `scoop install itasha-corp/c0pl4nd`). The __PLACEHOLDER__ values (version/url/hash) seed the first publish; thereafter the checkver + autoupdate blocks below let `scoop update` resolve the new version and recompute the hash AUTONOMOUSLY from the published asset — no hand-edited hash, ever (WezTerm #7713 hash-drift avoidance). Scoop installs the NSIS .exe per-user; for a per-machine install use winget (Scope: machine) or the installer directly.
